meta.title: Kristyan Carvalho — Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Kristyan Carvalho, full-stack developer focused on web applications, APIs, terminal tools, Linux, automation and open source.

hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.intro: I build web applications, APIs, terminal tools and automations with a focus on performance, clean architecture and good interfaces.

about.title: About
about.bio: I am a full-stack developer focused on modern, performant and well-structured applications. I build APIs, web interfaces, terminal tools, automations and open-source projects. I care about turning ideas into usable systems, with attention to architecture, user experience, documentation and long-term maintainability.
about.work: I focus on clear, well-typed code, pragmatic decisions and attention to documentation, testing and long-term maintainability.
